code.text: 12-week course of Physical Therapy for Lumbar Stenosis

note.text: Patient completed 24 sessions. Minimal improvement in neurogenic claudication symptoms. Pain returns immediately upon standing.

text.div: Generated by Synthea.Version identifier: master-branch-latest . Person seed: -8898842929000968142 Population seed: 1773182513581

resource.conclusion: Severe central spinal stenosis at L4-L5 primarily due to ligamentum flavum hypertrophy and facet joint overgrowth. Findings correlate with the clinical diagnosis of Neurogenic Claudication.

code.text: Neurogenic claudication (Symptoms: leg heaviness and pain while walking)
Lumbar Facet Arthropathy (Mechanical back pain when standing)
